title: Final Fantasy XVI
insight: Final Fantasy 16 is the series’ first full-fledged action-RPG, fully doing away with the classic turn-based battle system it has long been known for and takes FF15’s action-combat to a whole-new level of complexity and depth. With Devil May Cry(DMC) combat director Ryota Suzuki on board, FF16 is the most modern evolution of stylish combo-driven combat that made the DMC series so popular.
